mapper.sql: AA.RAW_SEQ , AA.RAW_NAME , AA.PROD_COMPANY , AA.PROD_COUNTRY , AA.PROD_COUNTRY_NAME , AA.SUPPLIER , AA.WEIGHT , AA.RGT_DTTM , AA.PTN_NAME , AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.PTN_MEMB_PROFILE_ID , AA.NATION , AA.PTN_LIC , AA.RAW_ELEM_INFO_COUNT , AA.VIEW_SUM_CNT , AA.THUMBNAIL_ID , AA.DOCINFO AS DOCINFO , AA.RAW_TYPE_INFO AS RAW_TYPE_INFO , AA.RAW_ELEM_INFO AS RAW_ELEM_INFO , AA.RAW_DETAIL_INFO AS RAW_DETAIL_INFO

SELECT RAW_MST.raw_seq , RAW_MST.raw_name , RAW_MST.prod_company , RAW_MST.prod_country , COALESCE( (SELECT code_name FROM T_CODE_INF WHERE GRP_CODE='CH014' AND ETC5='KO' AND ETC1 = RAW_MST.prod_country LIMIT 1 ), RAW_MST.prod_country) AS prod_country_name , RAW_MST.supplier , RAW_MST.weight , RAW_MST.thumbnail_id , TO_CHAR(RAW_MST.rgt_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as rgt_dttm
, PI.ptn_name , PI.ptn_seq as ptn_seq , (SELECT FF.file_id FROM t_memb_inf TMI JOIN t_file_inf FF ON FF.ref_seq = TMI.memb_seq AND FF.ref_code = 'FT_PROFILE' AND COALESCE(FF.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE PI.ptn_seq = TMI.ptn_seq AND TMI.memb_type = '002' LIMIT 1 ) AS ptn_memb_profile_id /* 파트너사 관리자 프로필 이미지 */ , PI.nation , PI.ptn_lic
, SUB_INFO.docInfo , SUB_INFO.raw_type_info , SUB_INFO.raw_elem_info , json_array_length(SUB_INFO.raw_elem_info::json) AS raw_elem_info_count , SUB_INFO.raw_detail_info , SUB_INFO.view_sum_cnt
FROM T_RAW_MST RAW_MST /* 원료 마스터 */ JOIN T_PARTNER_INF PI /* 파트너사 */ ON RAW_MST.ptn_seq = PI.ptn_seq JOIN ( SELECT RM.raw_seq
,( SELECT jsonb_agg (sub) FROM ( SELECT RM.raw_seq AS "rawSeq" , DL.doc_code AS "docCode" , (CASE WHEN RD.doc_code IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS "yn" , DL.name_ko AS "nameKo" , DL.name_en AS "nameEn" FROM DOC_LIST DL LEFT OUTER JOIN T_RAW_DOC RD ON RM.raw_seq = RD.raw_seq AND DL.doc_code = RD.doc_code ORDER BY DL.doc_code ) sub ) AS docInfo /* 첨부파일 유무 리스트 */ , ( SELECT jsonb_agg (sub) FROM ( SELECT RM.raw_seq AS "rawSeq" , (CRT.grp_code || ':' || CRT.code) AS "codes" , CRT.grp_code AS "grpCode" , CRT.code AS "code" , CRT.code_nm_ko AS "nameKo" , CRT.code_nm_en AS "nameEn" FROM T_RAW_TYPE_INF RTI JOIN T_CM_RAW_TYPE CRT ON RM.raw_seq = RTI.raw_seq AND RTI.grp_code = CRT.grp_code AND RTI.code = CRT.code WHERE COALESCE(CRT.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY CRT.grp_code, CRT.sort_ord ) sub ) AS raw_type_info /* 원료 구분 */ , ( SELECT jsonb_agg (sub) FROM ( SELECT RM.raw_seq AS "rawSeq" , REI.raw_elm_seq AS "rawElmSeq" , INGD.id AS "id" , INGD.rep_name AS "repNameKo" , INGD.rep_name_en As "repNameEn" , INGD.kcai_id AS "kcaiId" , INGD.ewg_id AS "ewgId" , INGD.hw_ingd_id AS "hwIngdId" , INGD.inci AS "inci" , INGD.names_ko AS "namesKo" , INGD.names_en AS "namesEn" , INGD.nick_name AS "nickName" , INGD.cas_no AS "casNo" , INGD.ec_no AS "ecNo" , INGD.formula AS "formula" , INGD.exp_url1 AS "expUrl1" , INGD.exp_url2 AS "expUrl2" , INGD.ewg_score_min AS "ewgScoreMin" , INGD.ewg_score AS "ewgScore" , INGD.ewg_data_label AS "ewgDataLabel" , INGD.ewg_url AS "ewgUrl" , REI.sort_ord AS "sortOrd" , TO_CHAR(INGD.ewg_chng_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "ewgChngDttm" FROM T_RAW_ELEMENT_INF REI JOIN T_INGD_DIC INGD ON RM.raw_seq = REI.raw_seq AND REI.raw_elm_id = INGD.id ORDER BY REI.sort_ord ) sub ) AS raw_elem_info /* 원료 성분 목록 */
, ( SELECT jsonb_agg (sub) FROM ( SELECT RM.raw_seq AS "rawSeq" , RAW_DTL.raw_detail_seq AS "rawDetailSeq" , MI.memb_seq AS "membSeq" , MI.memb_name AS "membName" , (SELECT FF.file_id FROM t_file_inf FF WHERE FF.ref_seq = MI.memb_seq AND FF.ref_code = 'FT_PROFILE' AND COALESCE(FF.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' LIMIT 1 ) AS "membProfileId" , MI.nickname AS "nickname" , RAW_DTL.title AS "title" , RAW_DTL.raw_desc AS "rawDesc" , RAW_DTL.hashtag AS "hashtag" , RAW_DTL.raw_detail_text AS "rawDetail" , RAW_DTL.file_content AS "fileContent" , RAW_DTL.view_cnt AS "viewCnt" , RAW_DTL.request_cnt AS "requestCnt" , TO_CHAR(RAW_DTL.rgt_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "rgtDttm" , TO_CHAR(RAW_DTL.chng_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "chngDttm" ,( SELECT jsonb_agg (file_sub) FROM ( SELECT FI.file_id AS "fileId" , FI.ref_code AS "refCode" , RAW_DTL.raw_detail_seq AS "rawDetailSeq" , FI.file_name AS "fileName" , FI.file_ext AS "fileExt" , FI.file_size AS "fileSize" , TO_CHAR(FI.chng_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "chngDttm" FROM T_FILE_INF FI WHERE FI.ref_code = 'FT_RAW' AND FI.ref_seq = RAW_DTL.raw_detail_seq AND COALESCE(FI.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY FI.sort_ord ) file_sub ) AS files /* 원료 상세 파일 목록 */ FROM T_RAW_DETAIL RAW_DTL /* 원료 상세 */ JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON RAW_DTL.memb_seq = MI.memb_seq WHERE RM.raw_seq = RAW_DTL.raw_seq AND COALESCE(RAW_DTL.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(RAW_DTL.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(MI.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY RAW_DTL.view_cnt DESC, RAW_DTL.chng_dttm ASC ) sub ) AS raw_detail_info /* 원료 상세 목록 */
, (SELECT count(*) FROM T_RAW_DETAIL RAW_DTL WHERE RM.raw_seq = RAW_DTL.raw_seq AND COALESCE(RAW_DTL.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(RAW_DTL.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ) AS raw_detail_info_cnt /* raw_detail_info_cnt 계산 */
, (SELECT SUM(RAW_DTL.view_cnt) FROM T_RAW_DETAIL RAW_DTL WHERE RM.raw_seq = RAW_DTL.raw_seq AND COALESCE(RAW_DTL.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ) AS view_sum_cnt /* view_sum_cnt 계산 */
FROM T_RAW_MST RM WHERE COALESCE(RM.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(RM.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' GROUP BY RM.raw_seq
) SUB_INFO ON RAW_MST.raw_seq = SUB_INFO.raw_seq
mapper.update:
/* com.erns.coching.search.mapper.CochingEsRawDAO.createTable */
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t_es_raw AS
WITH DOC_LIST AS ( /* 문서 코드 리스트 */ SELECT DC.etc1 AS doc_code, MAX(KCD.code_name) AS name_ko, MAX(ECD.code_name) AS name_en FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT grp_code, etc1 FROM T_CODE_INF WHERE grp_code = 'CH003' ) DC LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CODE_INF KCD ON DC.grp_code = KCD.grp_code AND DC.etc1 = KCD.etc1 LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CODE_INF ECD ON DC.grp_code = ECD.grp_code AND DC.etc1 = ECD.etc1 GROUP BY DC.etc1 ORDER BY DC.etc1 )
AND COALESCE(RAW_MST.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(RAW_MST.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(PI.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SUB_INFO.raw_detail_info_cnt > 0 /* 원료 상세가 없는거 필터링 */
